# dtarsnouveau — dossier

one-line:   Dynamic Trees worldgen compat for Ars Nouveau archwood trees (added v0.7.0): DT branch/leaves/
            root/seed equivalents so the host mod's trees grow dynamically. No recipes, no tags.
vibe:       worldgen polish (support)
signature:  none — pure compat layer

anchors:    support (worldgen compat); the underlying tree economy belongs to the host mod.
2nd-anchor candidates: none — slate verdict LEAVE (sweep P-2): zero weave surface.
